en_title: First Alien: Isolation 2 Footage Revealed at Summer Game Fest 2026
cn_title: 《异形：隔离2》首支预告片在夏日游戏节公开
subtitle: 异形归来，更聪明更致命
opus_summary: 世嘉与Creative Assembly在夏日游戏节公布《异形：隔离2》预告片，登陆PS5、Xbox Series、PC及任天堂Switch 2，新主角在Kurosaki Station对抗更聪明的异形。

paragraphs.en: Sega and Creative Assembly have finally officially revealed Alien: Isolation 2 with a new trailer at Summer Game Fest 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 世嘉与Creative Assembly终于在2026年夏日游戏节上，通过一支全新预告片正式公布了《异形：隔离2》。

paragraphs.en: While the trailer stops short of announcing a release date or even a release window, Alien: Isolation 2 has now been confirmed for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC via Steam, and can now be wishlisted from their respective stores. Alien: Isolation 2 will also be coming to Nintendo Switch 2, and will be available to wishlist from the eShop soon.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然预告片并未公布发售日期或发售窗口，但《异形：隔离2》已确认登陆PS5、Xbox Series X/S以及PC（Steam）平台，现已在各平台商店开放愿望单。游戏还将登陆任天堂Switch 2，并将很快在eShop上架愿望单。

paragraphs.en: Players will explore the Weyland-Yutani outpost Kurosaki Station as part of Alien: Isolation 2’s campaign. The story will be told from the perspective of a brand new protagonist, and once again pit you against the deadly xenomorph in a terrifying game of cat-and-mouse. New tools, techniques, and tactics to help you outmaneuver and overcome the perfect organism are promised.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家将在《异形：隔离2》的战役中探索Weyland-Yutani的前哨站Kurosaki Station。故事将围绕一位全新主角展开，再次让你与致命的异形展开一场惊心动魄的猫鼠游戏。游戏承诺提供新的工具、技巧和战术，帮助你智取并战胜这个完美有机体。

paragraphs.en: “It has been over a decade since we created the original Alien: Isolation and I am so excited to show everyone the first glimpse of the sequel,” said creative director Al Hope in a statement. “Our dedicated Survival team at Creative Assembly has been working hard to create a new, evolved Isolation experience continuing the legacy of the Alien franchise, making the eponymous killer smarter, the environment harsher and the chance of survival slimmer.”
paragraphs.cn: 「距离我们制作初代《异形：隔离》已经过去十多年了，我非常激动能向大家展示续作的初貌，」创意总监Al Hope在声明中表示。「Creative Assembly的生存团队一直致力于打造全新进化的《隔离》体验，延续《异形》系列的遗产，让同名杀手更聪明，环境更严酷，生存几率更低。」

paragraphs.en: Creative Assembly confirmed that a sequel to Alien: Isolation was in the works back in 2024, a decade after the original was released. Earlier this year it teased outdoor environments , a major change from the claustrophobic corridors of the first game. As this new trailer shows, Alien: Isolation 2 will shift between interior and exterior locations, allowing us to explore the surface of the colony world beyond the walls of Kurosaki Station.
paragraphs.cn: Creative Assembly早在2024年就确认《异形：隔离》续作正在开发中，距离初代发售已过去十年。今年早些时候，他们预告了室外环境，这是对初代幽闭走廊的重大改变。正如这支新预告片所示，《异形：隔离2》将在室内和室外场景之间切换，让我们得以探索Kurosaki Station围墙之外的殖民地世界表面。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 if you need a catch up on what the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解游戏行业的最新动态，这里是2026年夏日游戏节公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Matt Purslow is IGN's Executive Editor of Features.
paragraphs.cn: Matt Purslow是IGN的特稿执行编辑。
